summary: Phase 16 - Frontend-only testing of latest UI enhancements. All 8 requested features verified and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 requested features are implemented correctly
Campaign Wizard correctly reduced from 9 to 8 steps (IO step removed)
Creatives page has proper format-based tabs with visual previews
Browser include/exclude targeting has all 10 browser options
Ad Placement Controls properly organized with Display, Display in Content, and Native sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: All latest enhancements verified working. Campaign Wizard has 8 steps. Creatives page has format tabs (All, Display, Video, Native, JS Tags). Targeting step has 6 tabs: Geography, Device, Inventory, Supply, Contextual, Technical.

features: Domain/URL Allowlist textarea with Upload CSV button
Domain/URL Blocklist textarea with Upload CSV button
App Allowlist textarea with Upload CSV button
App Blocklist textarea with Upload CSV button
Bulk input supports comma-separated, line-by-line, and CSV upload

targeting_technical_tab_browsers.note: 10 browser options in both Include and Exclude sections

sections: Display Placements (Above the Fold, Below the Fold, Unknown) - Include/Exclude
Display in Content (In-article, In-feed, Interstitial, In-banner, Unknown) - Include/Exclude
Native Placements (In-article, In-feed, Peripheral, Recommendation, Unknown) - Include/Exclude

targeting_geography_exclude_locations.note: Enhanced to match include tab functionality

features: Play button icons for video creatives
HTML Banner code icons for banner creatives
Size badges showing dimensions and duration

sidebar_no_insertion_orders.note: Insertion Orders link completely removed from sidebar navigation and routes
